message:
feat(decision): add Wonham filtering + Gittins index scheduling (process_triage-p15.9)

Implement continuous-time Wonham filter for hidden Markov state estimation
and Gittins index scheduling for optimal probe allocation. The module is
purely advisory and inert by default — it does not alter existing decision
behavior unless explicitly invoked.

Components:
- GeneratorMatrix: continuous-time rate matrix Q with Euler and matrix-exp
  conversion to discrete-time TransitionModel
- WonhamFilter: continuous-time predict + Bayesian update for 4-class POMDP
- compute_gittins_index: finite-horizon value iteration for stop-vs-continue
- compute_gittins_schedule: deterministic candidate ranking by Gittins index

24 unit tests, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
